# Tardiff & Saldo Law Offices
> A Different Kind of Law Firm: estate planning, business law, and civil litigation attorneys serving San Luis Obispo County, CA, with 30+ years combined experience.

Tardiff & Saldo Law Offices (legal entity: Appellate Advocacy Group) is a multi-disciplinary law firm based in downtown San Luis Obispo, California. Founded by Central Coast natives Tyler Saldo and Dustin Tardiff, the firm serves individuals, families, and businesses throughout SLO County. A core differentiator is that the firm's litigators also do transactional work, meaning contracts, trusts, and business agreements are drafted by attorneys who have argued these documents in court. The firm offers flat-fee estate planning packages, contingency-fee personal injury representation, and free consultations on all practice areas.

## Services

- **Trusts & Estate Planning**: Living trusts, wills, powers of attorney, healthcare directives, special needs trusts, guardianship designations. Flat-fee packages. Most everyone needs a trust; the firm has litigated poorly written estate plans.
- **Living Trusts & Wills**: California-specific trust planning including Prop 19 compliance, trust funding guidance, and community property considerations.
- **Probate Law**: California probate administration, trust disputes, will contests, executor representation. California probate threshold: $184,500 (periodically adjusted).
- **Business Law**: Formation (LLC/Corp), contracts, buy-sell agreements, M&A, shareholder disputes, business litigation. Drafted by trial attorneys.
- **Civil Litigation**: Full-spectrum civil litigation including personal injury, auto accidents, wrongful death, slip and fall, TBI, birth injury, and business disputes.
- **Personal Injury**: No fee unless we recover. Slip and fall, premises liability, product liability, catastrophic injuries.
- **Auto Accidents**: Car, truck, motorcycle, bicycle, pedestrian, and rideshare accidents throughout SLO County.
- **Wrongful Death**: Representing surviving family members in negligence and misconduct fatality cases. Contingency basis.
- **Appellate Law**: Civil and criminal appeals at California Court of Appeal and above. Writs, post-judgment motions, habeas corpus petitions.

## Service Areas

- San Luis Obispo, CA 93401 (primary office, near County Courthouse)
- Paso Robles, CA 93446 (North County, wine country, agriculture)
- Arroyo Grande, CA 93420 (South County, Five Cities area)
- Atascadero, CA 93422 (North Central County)
- Morro Bay, CA 93442 (Coastal SLO County, Los Osos, Cayucos)
- All of San Luis Obispo County, CA

## Key Differentiators

- Litigators who also draft transactional documents (contracts, trusts, business agreements)
- Central Coast natives with deep knowledge of local courts and business landscape
- 30+ years combined experience across all practice areas
- Flat-fee estate planning with transparent pricing and payment plans
- Free consultations on all matters; same-week appointments often available
- No fee unless we recover on personal injury and wrongful death cases
- California-specific expertise: Prop 19, community property, probate thresholds

## Attorneys

- **Tyler Saldo**: Founding Attorney, Central Coast native
- **Dustin Tardiff**: Founding Attorney, Central Coast native

- **Becky Hall**: Paralegal
